TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY TJIS ACTION PENDING COMPLETION OF ARBITRATION, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT MILLER, BRAD HEARING SET FOR AUG-04-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT.
